params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
params.context: 48차 V7-F-B/C combined engine code (run_id 20260506-224644-84184). Per #711 V7-F-A PARTIAL + URL query supported_block_use_cases=answer_modes&media_items&knowledge_cards revealed, the SPA expects blocks[] with use_case enum matching that list. V7-F-B/C combined adds entries[].blocks[{use_case:answer_modes, answer_modes_block:{...}}] alongside schematized_response from V7-F-A. Both schemas in same body. HP-V7F-B test.

test_steps: 2. Submit PII prompt → engine fires V7-C SSE block
6. Capture DOM — answer panel content? bubble visible? warning text rendered?

verdict_criteria.OK: warning bubble visible + Korean warning text in DOM (HP-V7F-B confirmed → perplexity DONE → mission ratio 14→15/31=0.484)
verdict_criteria.PARTIAL_h2_clean_but_no_bubble: still empty — both schematized_response AND blocks[] insufficient. Defer:user_har for ground truth.
verdict_criteria.PARTIAL_partial_render: some text visible — narrows hypothesis space
verdict_criteria.FAIL: regression vs V7-F-A — revert to V7-E

notes: 48차 V7-F-B/C: blocks[answer_modes_block] + schematized_response combined. Body ~1.7KB. URL hint supported_block_use_cases=answer_modes is the smoking gun. If still PARTIAL → defer:user_har required for ground truth schema.
